issueDatetime.description: The date and time the convertible note was issued.

principal.description: The principal amount of the convertible note.

valuationCap.description: The valuation cap for conversion. May be absent if no cap was set.

discountPercentage.description: The discount percentage applied at conversion, expressed as a percentage (e.g., `20` for a 20% discount). May be absent if no discount was set.

conversionTrigger.description: The qualifying financing threshold that triggers automatic conversion. May be absent if no conversion trigger was set.

maturityDatetime.description: The maturity date and time of the convertible note. May be absent if no maturity date was set.

noteBlockId.description: The identifier of the note block from which the convertible note was issued.

precededBySecurityId.description: The identifier of the security that preceded this convertible note (e.g. the note that was transferred). May be absent if the note was issued directly.

interestRate.description: The annual interest rate that the convertible note accrues, expressed as a percentage (e.g., `5` for 5%). May be absent if no interest rate was set.

interestAccrualPeriod.description: The length of time over which the interest due to the lender is calculated.

interestCompoundingPeriod.description: The interest compounding period of the convertible note.

dayCountBasis.description: The standardized way of counting the number of days between two dates.

schema_def.description: The issuance transaction for a convertible note. Represents the initial issuance of the note.
